title: Senior Teacher - Lovely Professional University - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Lovely Professional University - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Lovely Professional University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Allahabad-based team.

About Lovely Professional University:
Lovely Professional University is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lovely Professional University!
